title: CVD Risk Chart Development, Evaluation, and Validation
author: Nizal Sarrafzadegan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j7rcrm6

steps.title: Using Cox proportional hazard regression A...
steps.instruction: Using Cox proportional hazard regression A broad set of risk factors were independently assessed. The most important risk factors were then hierarchically included in the model based on the higher hazard ratio and significance.

steps.title: IF the selected risk factors are...
steps.instruction: IF the selected risk factors are not acceptable, go to step #5

steps.title: Discrimination (AUROC, Harrell’s C indices) Calibration...
steps.instruction: Discrimination (AUROC, Harrell’s C indices) Calibration (Nam-D’Agostino chi-square test) Overall bias (predefined risk threshold for incidence)

steps.title: Online web-based prediction tool
steps.instruction: Online web-based prediction tool: JavaScript and Bootstrap (PARS example: http://www.prognosis.ir/Pars/) Offline Android app: Android Studio and API level 19 (PARS example: http://www.prognosis.ir/Pars/Android/PARS.zip) Risk chart: Color-coded (CVD) probabilities (PARS example: Manuscript address)
